StopInstancesBatchStop.action: Action to perform on instances; value for this API: stop
StopInstancesBatchStop.instanceIds: Collection of instance IDs; maximum 100 elements
StopInstancesBatchStop.forceStop: Whether to force shutdown; values: true/false; default: false
StopInstancesBatchStop.stopWithNoCharge: Whether to stop without billing; values: true/false; default: false
